cns.utils.files module

cns.utils.files.dataframe_array_split(df, n_splits)

Splits a DataFrame into n_splits parts as equally as possible.

Parameters: - df: The pandas DataFrame to split. - n_splits: The number of parts to split the DataFrame into.

Returns: - A list of pandas DataFrame objects.

cns.utils.files.fill_sex_if_missing(cns, samples)

cns.utils.files.load_segments(path)
